---
title: "Mechanism Design"
description: "VCG, auction formats, matching, voting — designing the rules of the game."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="mechanism-design"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Mechanism Design

VCG, auction formats, matching, voting — designing the rules of the game.
